<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete an Event"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/{organisation}/events/{ksuid}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Permanently delete an event and its related entities. Requires super admin privileges.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"organisation","in":"path","description":"Organisation slug","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","title":"organisation"}},{"name":"ksuid","in":"path","description":"Unique event ID (KSUID)","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","title":"ksuid"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Event deleted successfully.","headers":{}},"400":{"description":"Bad request.","headers":{}},"403":{"description":"Forbidden.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"message":{"type":"string"},"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}},"headers":{}},"404":{"description":"Event not found.","headers":{}},"500":{"description":"Internal server error.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"message":{"type":"string"},"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}},"headers":{}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
